name: qwen3_vl_8b_instruct
_note: Official FP8 checkpoint (bf16 needs ~17 GB and OOMs the 4080). Same base model as the -Thinking variant below: the pair isolates chain-of-thought with weights held fixed.

name: qwen3_vl_8b_thinking
_note: Official FP8 checkpoint. Serve with vLLM's reasoning parser so message.content carries only the post-think answer (see serve_vllm.sh); the JSON extractor must never see the <think> block. max_tokens raised 4096->6144 (2026-07-24): at 4096 the <think> block plus JSON answer was truncated on 24/579 hard items, dropping them from the paired ablation. Do NOT set this to 8192 — max_tokens is the OUTPUT budget and prompt+output must fit --max-model-len 8192 (prompts run ~1.1-1.5k tokens), so 8192 makes every call 400.

name: qwen2_5_vl_7b
_note: Fallback if the installed vLLM predates Qwen3-VL support.

name: or_free_example
_note: OpenRouter $0 tier. The :free list drifts — check https://openrouter.ai/models?q=free for current vision-capable entries before running, and rename this entry to match.
